blended.narrative: Whiteface is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.6 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 240 ft. Looking ahead, 17 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 3.8" of snow, highs of 20°F. Expect powder.
Tuesday: 5" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
